question_en: What chapter of Open Data Structures introduces the SkiplistSSet?
question_ko: Open Data Structures의 어느 장에서 SkiplistSSet을 소개하는가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?c WHERE { ods:SkiplistSSet ods:chapter ?c . }

question_en: What is the worst-case complexity of ArrayStack.get?
question_ko: ArrayStack.get의 최악 시간 복잡도는?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?b WHERE { ods:op_ArrayStack_get ods:hasWorstCaseComplexity ?c . ?c ods:bigO ?b . }

question_en: Which interface does ChainedHashTable implement?
question_ko: ChainedHashTable은 어떤 인터페이스를 구현하는가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?label WHERE { ods:ChainedHashTable ods:implements ?i . ?i rdfs:label ?label . }

question_en: What is the big-O notation for logarithmic complexity in this ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에서 logarithmic 복잡도의 big-O 표기는?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?b WHERE { ods:Logarithmic ods:bigO ?b . }

question_en: What is the worst-case complexity of find in RedBlackTree?
question_ko: RedBlackTree에서 find 연산의 최악 복잡도는?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?b WHERE { ods:op_RedBlackTree_find ods:hasWorstCaseComplexity ?c . ?c ods:bigO ?b . }

question_en: Which data structures implement the SSet interface?
question_ko: SSet 인터페이스를 구현하는 자료구조를 모두 나열하라.
gold_answer_en: BinarySearchTree, Treap, ScapegoatTree, RedBlackTree, SkiplistSSet, BinaryTrie, XFastTrie, YFastTrie
gold_answer_ko: BinarySearchTree, Treap, ScapegoatTree, RedBlackTree, SkiplistSSet, BinaryTrie, XFastTrie, YFastTrie
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?s ods:implements ods:SSet ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which sort algorithm directly uses BinaryHeap?
question_ko: 어떤 정렬 알고리즘이 BinaryHeap을 직접 사용하는가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?s a ods:SortAlgorithm ; ods:uses ods:BinaryHeap ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: How many array-based structures are defined in the ontology?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에 정의된 array-based 구조는 몇 개인가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?s) AS ?n) WHERE { ?s a ods:ArrayBasedStructure . }

question_en: Which structures implement both List and Deque?
question_ko: List와 Deque를 모두 구현하는 자료구조는?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ?s ods:implements ods:List ; ods:implements ods:Deque ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which structures does the Graph interface get implemented by?
question_ko: Graph 인터페이스는 어떤 자료구조들에 의해 구현되는가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?s ods:implements ods:Graph ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List all data structures introduced in Chapter 13.
question_ko: 13장에 소개된 자료구조를 모두 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?lbl WHERE { ?s ods:chapter 13 ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List all data structures that HeapSort uses, directly or indirectly.
question_ko: HeapSort가 직접 또는 간접적으로 사용하는 모든 자료구조를 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ods:HeapSort ods:uses+ ?x . ?x rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which data structures does YFastTrie specialise (directly or indirectly)?
question_ko: YFastTrie가 직접 또는 간접적으로 특수화하는 자료구조는?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ods:YFastTrie ods:specialises+ ?x . ?x rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: List every data structure transitively used by any structure introduced in Chapter 13.
question_ko: 13장의 자료구조가 (직접 또는 간접적으로) 사용하는 모든 자료구조를 나열하라.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ?s ods:chapter 13 ; ods:uses+ ?x . ?x rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: All ancestors of Treap via specialises (direct + indirect).
question_ko: Treap이 (직접 + 간접) 특수화하는 모든 상위 자료구조.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ods:Treap ods:specialises+ ?x . ?x rdfs:label ?lbl . }

question_en: Which sort algorithms use a counting-based primitive (directly or indirectly)?
question_ko: 어떤 정렬 알고리즘이 (직접 또는 간접적으로) 카운팅 기반 원소를 사용하는가?
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT DISTINCT ?lbl WHERE { ?s a ods:SortAlgorithm ; ods:uses+ ods:CountingSort ; rdfs:label ?lbl . }

trap_note: AuroraTree is not in the ontology; LLM must refuse, not hallucinate from prior knowledge.
question_en: What is the worst-case complexity of insert in AuroraTree?
question_ko: AuroraTree에서 insert의 최악 복잡도는?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. AuroraTree is not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 AuroraTree는 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a ods:DataStructure . FILTER(STR(?s) = STR(ods:AuroraTree)) }

trap_note: SplayTree exists in the data-structures literature but is NOT in this ontology — LLM must refuse rather than recall textbook knowledge.
question_en: Which interface does the SplayTree implement?
question_ko: SplayTree는 어떤 인터페이스를 구현하는가?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. SplayTree is not defined here.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에는 SplayTree가 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a ods:DataStructure . FILTER(STR(?s) = STR(ods:SplayTree)) }

trap_note: Chapter 15 does not exist in this ontology (covered chapters are 2–13).
question_en: List all data structures introduced in Chapter 15.
question_ko: 15장에 소개된 자료구조를 모두 나열하라.
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. No structure is tagged Chapter 15.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s ods:chapter 15 . }

trap_note: TimSort is real-world but absent from this ontology; ground-truth answer must reject the question.
question_en: Which sort algorithm in this ontology uses TimSort internally?
question_ko: 이 온톨로지에서 TimSort를 내부적으로 사용하는 정렬 알고리즘은?
gold_answer_en: No information in this ontology. TimSort is not defined.
gold_answer_ko: 이 온톨로지에 TimSort는 정의되어 있지 않습니다.
gold_sparql: PREFIX ods: <https://ontorag.dev/ns/ods#> SELECT ?s WHERE { ?s a ods:SortAlgorithm . FILTER(STR(?s) = STR(ods:TimSort)) }
